page: Amazon Web Services r7gd.12xlarge is a memory-optimized server powered by 48 dedicated physical cores of the ARM64 AWS Graviton processor running at 2.6 GHz. It features 384.0 GB of RAM, providing a high 1:8 vCPU-to-memory ratio. The instance includes 2850 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 22 Gbps, running on the AWS Nitro hypervisor.

Benchmark data indicates top-tier memory performance, with the Passmark memory score reaching the top 10% tier. Multi-core CPU performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations are strong, placing in the top 25% of tested systems. Redis SET operations and static web serving throughput also show strong results. However, single-core CPU performance and small-model LLM text generation are average to poor.

Utilizing custom ARM-based Graviton processors allows this instance to deliver high memory density and local NVMe storage with favorable qualitative cost efficiency compared to traditional x86 architectures. The combination of high memory capacity, fast local storage, and strong multi-core performance makes it highly suitable for memory-intensive databases, caching layers like Redis, data-intensive web serving, and software compilation workloads.
description: Amazon Web Services r7gd.12xlarge is a memory-optimized, ARM64-based server powered by 48 dedicated physical cores of the AWS Graviton Neoverse-V1 processor. It is equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, delivering a high 1:8 vCPU-to-memory ratio, and includes 2850 GB of local NVMe SSD storage alongside a 22 Gbps baseline network speed. Operating on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, this instance demonstrates top-tier memory performance and strong multi-core processing capabilities in benchmarks. It excels in memory bandwidth, database operations, and Redis SET throughput, though single-core performance remains average. The custom ARM architecture provides qualitative cost efficiency for resource-dense deployments. This server is highly suited for memory-intensive databases, caching layers, and high-throughput web serving.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r7gd.12xlarge is an ARM64 memory-optimized server with 48 Graviton cores, 384 GB RAM, and 2850 GB local NVMe SSD, delivering top-tier memory performance and strong database benchmark results.

tagline: An ARM-powered, memory-optimized instance featuring high-capacity local NVMe storage and top-tier memory bandwidth for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by 48 dedicated physical ARM64 AWS Graviton cores at 2.6 GHz
Equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM and 2850 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier memory performance and strong multi-core benchmark results
Baseline network bandwidth of 22 Gbps managed by the Nitro hypervisor
Optimized for memory-intensive databases, caching layers, and web serving
